option.name: filePath
option.value: /BookingViewModel (snapshot).kt

option.value: /MapScreen (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /SettingsScreen (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /strings (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">lksParking</string>
<!-- TEXTO BOOKING_SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name ="booking_header_label">YOU ARE BOOKING A SPOT IN</string> <string name="booking_select_vehicle">Select Vehicle</string> <string name="booking_selected_start_time">Selected Start Time</string> <string name="booking_manage">Manage</string> <string name="booking_error_active">You already have an active reservation.</string> <string name="booking_error_past">Cannot book in the past. Select a future time.</string> <string name="booking_btn_confirm">Confirm Reservation</string> <string name="booking_btn_update">Update Reservation</string> <string name="booking_no_vehicles">No compatible vehicles found for %1$s.</string> <string name="booking_add_vehicle_hint">Please add a vehicle of this type in \'Manage\' to continue.</string> <string name="booking_select_date">Select Date</string> <string name="booking_time_duration">Time & Duration</string> <string name="booking_start_time">START TIME</string> <string name="booking_duration_label">DURATION</string> <string name="booking_ending_at">ENDING AT %1$s</string> <string name="booking_next_day_warning">(+1 day)</string> <string name="booking_hours_unit">hours</string> <string name="booking_today">TODAY</string> <string name="booking_change_vehicle_hint">Click here to change your vehicle!</string> <string name="booking_select_vehicle_hint">Click here to select your vehicle!</string> <string name="booking_error_overlap">Next booking at %1$s so you can maximum reserve %2$s hours</string> <string name="booking_error_vehicle_required">Plese select your vehicle to confirm the reservation!</string>
<!-- TEXTO BOOKING_REGISTER_SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name="register_title">My Reservations</string> <string name="register_empty">No active reservations</string>
<string name="reservation_missed">MISSED</string> <string name="reservation_past">PAST</string> <string name="reservation_checked_in">CHECKED IN</string> <string name="reservation_done">DONE</string>
<string name="notification_tab_active">Active (%1$d)</string> <string name="notification_tab_past">History (%1$d)</string> <string name="notification_past_empty">No history logs found</string>
<!-- TEXTO MAP SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name="map_header_title">LKS Next Parking</string> <string name="map_header_subtitle">Select a zone to book instantly</string>
<!-- TEXTO PROFILE SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name="profile_vehicles">My Vehicles</string> <string name="profile_add_vehicle_title">+ Add New Vehicle</string> <string name="profile_label_nickname">NICKNAME</string> <string name="profile_hint_nickname">Nickname</string> <string name="profile_placeholder_nickname">e.g. Work Car</string> <string name="profile_label_plate">LICENSE PLATE</string> <string name="profile_hint_plate">License Plate</string> <string name="profile_placeholder_plate">1234 ABC</string> <string name="profile_label_type">VEHICLE TYPE</string> <string name="profile_btn_save">Save Vehicle</string> <string name="profile_delete_title">Confirm Delete</string> <string name="profile_delete_msg">Are you sure you want to remove %1$s? This action cannot be undone.</string> <string name="btn_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="btn_delete">Delete</string> <string name="error_empty_fields">Fields cannot be empty.</string> <string name="error_duplicate_plate">A vehicle with this license plate already exists.</string> <string name="error_active_booking">Cannot delete: This vehicle has an active parking reservation.</string> <string name="error_generic">An unexpected error has occurred. Please try again.</string>
<!-- TEXTO LOGIN/REGISTER/RECOVERY EN INGLES --> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome Back</string> <string name="login_username">Username</string> <string name="login_password">Password</string> <string name="login_remember">Remember me</string> <string name="login_forgot">Forgot Password?</string> <string name="login_btn">LOG IN</string> <string name="login_no_account">Don\'t have an account?</string> <string name="login_register_link">Register here!</string> <string name="login_email_label">Email</string>
<string name="reg_title">Register</string> <string name="reg_label_name">Name</string> <string name="reg_label_plate">License Plate</string> <string name="reg_vehicle_type">Vehicle Type</string> <string name="reg_vehicle_name">Vehicle Name</string> <string name="reg_btn">SIGN UP</string> <string name="reg_label_lastname">Last Name</string> <string name="reg_label_email">Email</string> <string name="reg_label_confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="reg_already_have_account">Already have an account? </string> <string name="reg_login_link">Log In</string>
<string name="rec_title">Recover your password</string> <string name="rec_placeholder">Use your registration email</string> <string name="rec_btn_continue">Continue</string>
<string name="err_login_failed">Invalid email or password</string> <string name="err_invalid_email">Please enter a valid email address</string> <string name="err_password_short">Password must be at least 6 characters</string> <string name="err_password_mismatch">Passwords do not match</string> <string name="err_invalid_plate">License plate format is invalid (1234ABC)</string> <string name="err_user_exists">This username is already taken</string> <string name="err_registration_failed">Registration failed</string> <string name="error_invalid_email_or_not_found">This email is not registered in our system.</string>
<string name="rec_success_title">Email Sent</string> <string name="rec_success_body">If the email is registered, you will receive a link shortly. Please check your inbox and your spam folder.</string> <string name="btn_understood">Understood</string>
<!-- TEXTO DE LAS NOTIFICACIONES --> <string name="notification_channel_name">Parking Alerts</string> <string name="notification_default_title">Parking Update</string> <string name="notification_default_body">You have received a new update.</string>
<string name="notification_screen_title">Alerts Center Active</string> <string name="notification_screen_body">You will receive real-time alerts on your device when your reservations are about to start, expire, or when you forgot about doing the check-in.</string> <string name="notification_screen_icon_desc">Active alerts icon</string>
<string name="notification_channel_id">parking_alerts_channel</string> <string name="notification_title_start">Your booking starts soon!</string> <string name="notification_body_start">There are 30 minutes left until your booking begins in %1$s (%2$s).</string>
<string name="notification_title_end">Your time is running out!</string> <string name="notification_body_end">There are 15 minutes left until your booking ends. Remember to remove your vehicle.</string> <string name="notification_title_default">Parking Alert</string>
<string name="zone_default_standard">Standard Zone</string>
<string name="notification_title_checkin_reminder">Pending Check-In</string> <string name="notification_body_checkin_reminder">You have a reservation active in %1$s. Please check in now or cancel your booking if you are not using it.</string> <string name="notification_unrestricted_battery">To receive alerts with the app closed, tap here and enable "Unrestricted battery" and restart the app.</string>
<string name="notification_system_alerts">System Alerts</string> <string name="notification_missed_title">Reservation Automatically Cancelled</string> <string name="notification_missed_body">Your reservation for vehicle %1$s (%2$s) in Zone %3$s on %4$s (%5$s to %6$s) was cancelled due to missing the check-in time.</string>
<!-- TEXTO DE LOS COMPONENTES EN INGLES --> <string name="footer_map">Map</string> <string name="footer_bookings">Bookings</string> <string name="footer_alerts">Alerts</string> <string name="footer_profile">Profile</string>
<string name="timepick_confirm">Confirm</string> <string name="timepick_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="timepick_selecttime">Select Time</string>
<string name="label_location">Level 1</string> <string name="label_date">DATE</string> <string name="label_time">TIME</string> <string name="label_vehicle">VEHICLE</string> <string name="label_available">AVAILABLE</string> <string name="label_free">free</string> <string name="label_full">FULL</string> <string name="status_active">ACTIVE</string> <string name="btn_edit">Edit</string> <string name="btn_check_in">Check-in Now</string>
<!-- TEXTO DE LAS ZONAS DEL MAPA --> <string name="zone_standard">Standard Zone</string> <string name="zone_disability">Disability Zone</string> <string name="zone_ev">EV Charging Zone</string> <string name="zone_motorcycle">Motorcycle Zone</string>
<string name="vehicle_type_standard">Standard</string> <string name="vehicle_type_motorcycle">Motorcycle</string> <string name="vehicle_type_electric">Electric</string> <string name="vehicle_type_adapted">Adapted</string>
<!--- TEXTO DE SETTINGS --> <string name="settings_title">Settings</string> <string name="settings_language_section">Application Language</string> <string name="settings_profile_section">Profile Details</string> <string name="settings_password_section">Change Password</string> <string name="settings_label_username">Username</string> <string name="settings_label_old_password">Current Password</string> <string name="settings_label_new_password">New Password</string> <string name="settings_btn_save_profile">Save Profile</string> <string name="settings_btn_change_password">Update Password</string> <string name="error_password_too_short">Password must be at least 6 characters.</string> <string name="error_wrong_old_password">The current password you entered is incorrect.</string> <string name="success_profile_updated">Profile updated successfully!</string> <string name="success_password_changed">Password updated successfully!</string>
</resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">lksParking</string>
<!-- TEXTO BOOKING_SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name ="booking_header_label">YOU ARE BOOKING A SPOT IN</string> <string name="booking_select_vehicle">Select Vehicle</string> <string name="booking_selected_start_time">Selected Start Time</string> <string name="booking_manage">Manage</string> <string name="booking_error_active">You already have an active reservation.</string> <string name="booking_error_past">Cannot book in the past. Select a future time.</string> <string name="booking_btn_confirm">Confirm Reservation</string> <string name="booking_btn_update">Update Reservation</string> <string name="booking_no_vehicles">No compatible vehicles found for %1$s.</string> <string name="booking_add_vehicle_hint">Please add a vehicle of this type in \'Manage\' to continue.</string> <string name="booking_select_date">Select Date</string> <string name="booking_time_duration">Time & Duration</string> <string name="booking_start_time">START TIME</string> <string name="booking_duration_label">DURATION</string> <string name="booking_ending_at">ENDING AT %1$s</string> <string name="booking_next_day_warning">(+1 day)</string> <string name="booking_hours_unit">hours</string> <string name="booking_today">TODAY</string> <string name="booking_change_vehicle_hint">Click here to change your vehicle!</string> <string name="booking_select_vehicle_hint">Click here to select your vehicle!</string> <string name="booking_error_overlap">Next booking at %1$s so you can maximum reserve %2$s hours</string> <string name="booking_error_vehicle_required">Plese select your vehicle to confirm the reservation!</string>
<!-- TEXTO BOOKING_REGISTER_SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name="register_title">My Reservations</string> <string name="register_empty">No active reservations</string>
<string name="reservation_missed">MISSED</string> <string name="reservation_past">PAST</string> <string name="reservation_checked_in">CHECKED IN</string> <string name="reservation_done">DONE</string>
<string name="notification_tab_active">Active (%1$d)</string> <string name="notification_tab_past">History (%1$d)</string> <string name="notification_past_empty">No history logs found</string>
<!-- TEXTO MAP SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name="map_header_title">LKS Next Parking</string> <string name="map_header_subtitle">Select a zone to book instantly</string>
<!-- TEXTO PROFILE SCREEN EN INGLES --> <string name="profile_vehicles">My Vehicles</string> <string name="profile_add_vehicle_title">+ Add New Vehicle</string> <string name="profile_label_nickname">NICKNAME</string> <string name="profile_hint_nickname">Nickname</string> <string name="profile_placeholder_nickname">e.g. Work Car</string> <string name="profile_label_plate">LICENSE PLATE</string> <string name="profile_hint_plate">License Plate</string> <string name="profile_placeholder_plate">1234 ABC</string> <string name="profile_label_type">VEHICLE TYPE</string> <string name="profile_btn_save">Save Vehicle</string> <string name="profile_delete_title">Confirm Delete</string> <string name="profile_delete_msg">Are you sure you want to remove %1$s? This action cannot be undone.</string> <string name="btn_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="btn_delete">Delete</string> <string name="error_empty_fields">Fields cannot be empty.</string> <string name="error_duplicate_plate">A vehicle with this license plate already exists.</string> <string name="error_active_booking">Cannot delete: This vehicle has an active parking reservation.</string> <string name="error_generic">An unexpected error has occurred. Please try again.</string>
<!-- TEXTO LOGIN/REGISTER/RECOVERY EN INGLES --> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome Back</string> <string name="login_username">Username</string> <string name="login_password">Password</string> <string name="login_remember">Remember me</string> <string name="login_forgot">Forgot Password?</string> <string name="login_btn">LOG IN</string> <string name="login_no_account">Don\'t have an account?</string> <string name="login_register_link">Register here!</string> <string name="login_email_label">Email</string>
<string name="reg_title">Register</string> <string name="reg_label_name">Name</string> <string name="reg_label_plate">License Plate</string> <string name="reg_vehicle_type">Vehicle Type</string> <string name="reg_vehicle_name">Vehicle Name</string> <string name="reg_btn">SIGN UP</string> <string name="reg_label_lastname">Last Name</string> <string name="reg_label_email">Email</string> <string name="reg_label_confirm_password">Confirm Password</string> <string name="reg_already_have_account">Already have an account? </string> <string name="reg_login_link">Log In</string>
<string name="rec_title">Recover your password</string> <string name="rec_placeholder">Use your registration email</string> <string name="rec_btn_continue">Continue</string>
<string name="err_login_failed">Invalid email or password</string> <string name="err_invalid_email">Please enter a valid email address</string> <string name="err_password_short">Password must be at least 6 characters</string> <string name="err_password_mismatch">Passwords do not match</string> <string name="err_invalid_plate">License plate format is invalid (1234ABC)</string> <string name="err_user_exists">This username is already taken</string> <string name="err_registration_failed">Registration failed</string> <string name="error_invalid_email_or_not_found">This email is not registered in our system.</string>
<string name="rec_success_title">Email Sent</string> <string name="rec_success_body">If the email is registered, you will receive a link shortly. Please check your inbox and your spam folder.</string> <string name="btn_understood">Understood</string>
<!-- TEXTO DE LAS NOTIFICACIONES --> <string name="notification_channel_name">Parking Alerts</string> <string name="notification_default_title">Parking Update</string> <string name="notification_default_body">You have received a new update.</string>
<string name="notification_screen_title">Alerts Center Active</string> <string name="notification_screen_body">You will receive real-time alerts on your device when your reservations are about to start, expire, or when you forgot about doing the check-in.</string> <string name="notification_screen_icon_desc">Active alerts icon</string>
<string name="notification_channel_id">parking_alerts_channel</string> <string name="notification_title_start">Your booking starts soon!</string> <string name="notification_body_start">There are 30 minutes left until your booking begins in %1$s (%2$s).</string>
<string name="notification_title_end">Your time is running out!</string> <string name="notification_body_end">There are 15 minutes left until your booking ends. Remember to remove your vehicle.</string> <string name="notification_title_default">Parking Alert</string>
<string name="zone_default_standard">Standard Zone</string>
<string name="notification_title_checkin_reminder">Pending Check-In</string> <string name="notification_body_checkin_reminder">You have a reservation active in %1$s. Please check in now or cancel your booking if you are not using it.</string> <string name="notification_unrestricted_battery">To receive alerts with the app closed, tap here and enable "Unrestricted battery" and restart the app.</string>
<string name="notification_system_alerts">System Alerts</string> <string name="notification_missed_title">Reservation Automatically Cancelled</string> <string name="notification_missed_body">Your reservation for vehicle %1$s (%2$s) in Zone %3$s on %4$s (%5$s to %6$s) was cancelled due to missing the check-in time.</string>
<!-- TEXTO DE LOS COMPONENTES EN INGLES --> <string name="footer_map">Map</string> <string name="footer_bookings">Bookings</string> <string name="footer_alerts">Alerts</string> <string name="footer_profile">Profile</string>
<string name="timepick_confirm">Confirm</string> <string name="timepick_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="timepick_selecttime">Select Time</string>
<string name="label_location">Level 1</string> <string name="label_date">DATE</string> <string name="label_time">TIME</string> <string name="label_vehicle">VEHICLE</string> <string name="label_available">AVAILABLE</string> <string name="label_almost_full">ALMOST FULL</string> <string name="label_free">free</string> <string name="label_full">FULL</string> <string name="status_active">ACTIVE</string> <string name="btn_edit">Edit</string> <string name="btn_check_in">Check-in Now</string>
<!-- TEXTO DE LAS ZONAS DEL MAPA --> <string name="zone_standard">Standard Zone</string> <string name="zone_disability">Disability Zone</string> <string name="zone_ev">EV Charging Zone</string> <string name="zone_motorcycle">Motorcycle Zone</string>
<string name="vehicle_type_standard">Standard</string> <string name="vehicle_type_motorcycle">Motorcycle</string> <string name="vehicle_type_electric">Electric</string> <string name="vehicle_type_adapted">Adapted</string>
<!--- TEXTO DE SETTINGS --> <string name="settings_title">Settings</string> <string name="settings_language_section">Application Language</string> <string name="settings_profile_section">Profile Details</string> <string name="settings_password_section">Change Password</string> <string name="settings_label_username">Username</string> <string name="settings_label_old_password">Current Password</string> <string name="settings_label_new_password">New Password</string> <string name="settings_btn_save_profile">Save Profile</string> <string name="settings_btn_change_password">Update Password</string> <string name="error_password_too_short">Password must be at least 6 characters.</string> <string name="error_wrong_old_password">The current password you entered is incorrect.</string> <string name="success_profile_updated">Profile updated successfully!</string> <string name="success_password_changed">Password updated successfully!</string>
</resources>
